summary: TaxiG - All 3 reported bugs verified as FIXED. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed. Frontend tests: Client login, booking, price estimation working. Chauffeur login, service activation, course assignment, map centering, and route display all working correctly.

minor.issue: Multiple console warnings about deprecated Autocomplete API (will be deprecated after March 2025)

issues: Google Maps JavaScript API loaded multiple times - causes console warnings but doesn't break functionality

action_items: Consider updating Google Places Autocomplete to PlaceAutocompleteElement (deprecated March 2025)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG 1 VERIFIED FIXED: Price calculation for Paris-Lyon (465km) correctly shows ~1510€ instead of 24€. The handleDestinationSet() function in ClientDashboard.jsx correctly uses Google Directions API to get accurate road distance.
BUG 2 VERIFIED FIXED: MapController in ChauffeurDashboard.jsx correctly centers map between chauffeur and client positions using L.latLngBounds().fitBounds()
BUG 3 VERIFIED FIXED: decodePolyline() function correctly extracts .points property from overview_polyline and the blue Polyline renders on the map
Code quality is good - proper use of async/await, error handling, and data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test client and chauffeur accounts created if not existing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical bugs are fixed. Backend API fully functional. Frontend client/chauffeur flows working. Google Maps integration working for autocomplete, directions, and route display.

bug_1_price_calculation.evidence: Console log shows: Distance Google Directions: 465.582 km, Frontend displays 1510.00€

bug_2_map_centering.evidence: Console log shows: 'Map centered between 2 points', Screenshot shows map zoomed to fit both chauffeur and client markers

bug_3_route_visibility.evidence: Console log shows: 'Decoded polyline points: 85', 'Route calculated successfully: 4.8 km 18 mins', Screenshot shows blue route line on map
